# Newland School

> Bilingual private school in Queretaro, Mexico. Founded 2009.
> 5 campuses. 2,500+ families. Cognia-accredited. Apple Distinguished School.

## Programs
- Maternal (ages 2-3): Play-based English immersion, Brain Up methodology
- Kinder (ages 3-5): Bilingual immersion, project-based learning, multisensory approach
- Elementary (ages 6-11): IMPACT model, STEAM maker labs, Knotion methodology
- Middle School (ages 12-14): Dual international certifications, entrepreneurship program
- High School (ages 15-17): Life Project model, dual diploma (US Cognia + Mexican SEP)

## Campuses
- Juriquilla, Queretaro (Maternal - Middle School)
- Milenio, Queretaro (Maternal - Middle School)
- San Miguel de Allende, Guanajuato (Maternal - High School)
- Corregidora, Queretaro (Maternal - High School)
- Zibata, Queretaro (Maternal - High School)

## Educational Methodology
- Philosophy for Children (P4C) — critical thinking through guided dialogue
- I'm NWL Leader by Tec de Monterrey — leadership and emotional intelligence
- Knotion — project-based learning with real-world challenges, no traditional homework

## Accreditations & Partnerships
- Cognia (international accreditation, 88+ countries)
- Apple Distinguished School
- Tec de Monterrey (exclusive leadership program)
- Universidad Mondragon Mexico
- Hokku Academy
